name: sbox-claude
description: Build s&box games by talking to Claude — Claude Bridge MCP server, screenshot-driven game-dev workflow skill, and sbox-game-dev specialist agent.

plugins.name: sbox-claude
plugins.description: Connects Claude Code to the s&box editor via the Claude Bridge MCP server. Includes 99 tools for driving GameObjects, scripts, scenes, components, physics, networking, UI, world-gen, and type discovery. Bundled skill enforces the screenshot-driven iteration workflow that prevents the guess-and-check loop. Optional sbox-game-dev specialist agent for self-contained game features. The s&box-side bridge addon must be installed separately into your project's Libraries folder (see plugin README).
